description_long: This is a low-top athletic sneaker featuring a combination of off-white mesh and suede upper with bold red synthetic overlays. The shoe has a prominent red Nike Swoosh on both sides and a matching red accent wrapping around the toe and heel. The midsole is thick and white, incorporating a visible air unit for cushioning, while the outsole is dark and textured for traction. The heel displays the Nike Air branding in red, and the tongue also features a red Nike logo. The shoe is equipped with standard criss-cross lacing and appears clean and structurally intact, suitable for urban environments.
description: A stylish off-white and red Nike sneaker with mesh, suede, and synthetic overlays, featuring a visible air unit and bold branding.
description_view_0: Left side view showing the red Swoosh, red overlay, and visible air unit in the white midsole.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the red Nike Air branding on the heel and the layered construction of the upper.
description_view_2: Right side view with the red Swoosh, red overlay, and visible air unit, mirroring the left side.
description_view_3: Front view displaying the toe box, red mudguard, and standard criss-cross lacing.
attribute_logo: Red Nike Swoosh on both sides, red Nike Air text on heel, red Nike logo on tongue
